You can borrow a support ro clear wave 3
Alert 3 i mean

So 1 alert 3 team (whale support)

1 alert 2 or 3 (your storyteam)

Alert 1 for the rest if possible
You generally will always have 2 clears
Minimally
damage amplification and realm mastery are teamwide so your carry doesnt need to hold them
DPS covenants are stuff like crimson pulse, april tribute, steppenwolf
Dreams of medicine used by some that need their cards to function
usually you build full crit
and keyflare for those pieces that cant roll crit
Crit = Goes on your dps
everything else = goes on rest of team
keyflare = goes on everyone cause keyflare is busted in astral reign rules

Dore is an okay character to clear story but doesnt scale well end game. He's nice to have at base copy but don't invest any further
Can I ask why besides him being expensive
Also what's Arith Harmony

basically his gameplan is this:

1. generate exalt
2. exalt
3. oneshot a baby mob
4. generate revels
5. stack up revels
6. spam revels with his E3 to chain kill baby mobs
7. use the strength generated from exalt to kill boss


so a few problems already prop up: Doresian has no solid way of generating alemus, which is fine aliemus batteries exist, but actually its not fine; Thais is th only aliemus battery inside of Caro and Thais is… well the best support in the game so you can’t just always guarantee he will have her, so that leaves you with already having to dual realm more often than not. assuming you can loop Doresian’s exalt often enough then comes the issue that there won’t always be squishy minions for Doresian to scale off of, and there is a nonegligable amount of bosses that *do* summon minions, but too tanky for Doresian to onetap meaning that, assuming you can get it every turn (not super realistic) it takes 2 turns for killing a single enemy while the boss hasn’t been damaged in a significant way yet, but that’s ok because you now have 3 revels right? well, revels are really ehrm… whelming, even at E3 their damage is ok unless you’re fighting wifi fish who you can chain 2-3 revels for the price of one but that boss is quite literally custom made for Doresian to look good. So then what then? salt to the wound btw Dore’s strength gen alone doesn’t scale enough to meet his lowish multipliers, you need a strength generator, an aliemus battery, probably a strong sustain too so he doesn’t die while ramping

oh yeah btw forgot to mention but his entire damage is concentrated on 1-2 hits, so missing a crit is borderline reset worthy

uhhh read above

basically needs to be able to oneshot enemies and as you might guess that’s kinda demanding investment wise
